Host Description: I transplanted to Seattle in 2009, and the Pacific Northwest has become my new home. I am in love with its natural beauty and the abundance of year-round activities. Having grown up around the construction business, I developed a deep understanding of what makes a good home. My real estate passion comes from my desire to help you navigate the journey of purchasing one of the largest yet most personal items of your lifetime. I joined Redfin in 2014 to pursue this passion relentlessly. I like my customers to think of me as their coach throughout the entire process. My team and I will give you expert guidance at every turn, and I'll be by your side through the ups and downs. You can expect me to provide honest advice and tireless advocacy.

Buying, selling, or investing - let’s make it an adventure you’ll actually enjoy. My goal is simple: to get you the best outcome while keeping you informed, supported, and genuinely cared for every step of the way. From our first chat to closing day and beyond, I’ll be there to guide you, answer your questions, and celebrate every win. Backed by the Redfin team, I bring market insight, helpful tools, and a people-first approach. Consistently earning 5-star reviews, I’m here to help you step into a place that truly feels like home.

I've been a Loan Officer for over 10 years, specializing in residential mortgages and personalized financing strategies. I’m passionate about helping clients navigate the loan process with clarity and ease. I love working locally—it allows me to build lasting relationships and support my community firsthand.
